member.name: M:AddFishSpecies
member.syntax: AddFishSpecies(name[], rarity, minWeight, maxWeight, baseValue, expReward, zone_type, timeRestriction[])

member.name: M:Audio_Play3D
member.syntax: Audio_Play3D(playerid, url[], x, y, z, distance, volume, flags)

member.name: M:Audio_PlayInRange
member.syntax: Audio_PlayInRange(x, y, z, range, url[], volume)

member.name: M:Create3DTextLabel
member.syntax: Create3DTextLabel(text[], color, X, Y, Z, DrawDistance, virtualworld, testLOS)

member.name: M:CreateObject
member.syntax: CreateObject(modelid, X, Y, Z, rX, rY, rZ, DrawDistance)

member.name: M:CreateVehicle
member.syntax: CreateVehicle(vehicletype, x, y, z, rotation, color1, color2, respawn_delay, addsiren)

member.name: M:GetDistance3D
member.syntax: GetDistance3D(x1, y1, z1, x2, y2, z2)

member.name: M:OnCreateActor
member.syntax: OnCreateActor(playerid, x, y, z, a, zoneid)

member.name: M:OnCreateBoat
member.syntax: OnCreateBoat(playerid, x, y, z, a, zoneid)

member.name: M:OnPlayerEditAttachedObject
member.syntax: OnPlayerEditAttachedObject(playerid, response, index, modelid, boneid, fOffsetX, fOffsetY, fOffsetZ, fRotX, fRotY, fRotZ, fScaleX, fScaleY, fScaleZ)

member.name: M:OnPlayerEditObject
member.syntax: OnPlayerEditObject(playerid, playerobject, objectid, response, fX, fY, fZ, fRotX, fRotY, fRotZ)

member.name: M:OnPlayerSelectObject
member.syntax: OnPlayerSelectObject(playerid, type, objectid, modelid, fX, fY, fZ)

member.name: M:OnPlayerWeaponShot
member.syntax: OnPlayerWeaponShot(playerid, weaponid, hittype, hitid, fX, fY, fZ)

member.name: M:OnUnoccupiedVehicleUpdate
member.syntax: OnUnoccupiedVehicleUpdate(vehicleid, playerid, passenger_seat, new_x, new_y, new_z, vel_x, vel_y, vel_z)

member.name: M:ShowPlayerDialog
member.syntax: ShowPlayerDialog(playerid, dialogid, style, caption[], info[], button1[], button2[])
